Banana Bread Recipe

Mash ripe bananas with sugar, eggs, melted butter, flour, baking soda, and a
pinch of salt. Fold the batter gently so the loaf stays tender.

Bake until the top is golden and a tester comes out clean. Let the loaf cool
before slicing.

This document is unrelated to electric vehicles, invoices, authentication, and
retrieval systems. It should not appear in top results for vehicle or invoice
identifier searches.
